markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the South Africa vs Canada professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 28, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored. If the first goal of the match is an own goal, the market will resolve based on the next non-own-goal scored.
